post.description: Creates the very first application user as an admin.

get.description: Lists all provisioned users. Admin only.

post.description: Creates a new user. Admin only.

get.description: Fetches a single user by UUID. Admin only.

get.description: Returns summary totals, recent activity, category totals, and trend data for the authenticated user.
